# SuperHospitality

> SuperHospitality is a WhatsApp-first AI concierge platform for hotels that turns guest requests into instant staff actions without app downloads, missed calls, or manual relay.

This site is a compact product-marketing website for a hotel operations platform by SHUUL. It includes a landing page with the core value proposition, workflow, platform capabilities, deployment model, and beta call to action, plus a visual story page showing the operational problems the product solves.

The intended audience includes hotel owners, operators, general managers, and hospitality teams evaluating AI-assisted guest communication and service operations.

## Pages

- [Home](https://superhospitality.in/): Main product overview, messaging, workflow explanation, platform capabilities, technology summary, deployment model, and contact CTA.
- [Problem we solve](https://superhospitality.in/the-problem/): Scroll-driven narrative showing current hotel communication bottlenecks and how SuperHospitality resolves them.

## Related

- [SHUUL Technologies](https://shuul.io/): Parent company website.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://superhospitality.in/sitemap.xml): XML list of the public URLs on this site.
